Acceptance Criteria Coverage:
| AC | Status | Evidence |
| AC1 | pass | register-commands.ts:923-1007 dispatches single prompt via ExecutionOrchestrator.executeOne(); commands.test.ts covers dispatch with state assertion. |
| AC2 | pass | register-commands.ts:1009-1114 dispatches all ready prompts via ExecutionOrchestrator.execute() with DAG-resolved getReadyPrompts and progress; commands.test.ts covers batch and no-ready-prompts paths. |
| AC3 | pass | OutputChannel 'Workpack Manager Execution' created at register-commands.ts:630; execution start/finish/per-prompt log lines written via outputChannel.appendLine(). |
| AC4 | pass | runWithExecutionProgress() at register-commands.ts:499-545 wires withProgress(cancellable:true) with token.onCancellationRequested -> abortController.abort() -> signal passed to ExecutionOrchestrator. |
| AC5 | pass | extension.ts:18 reads configuration.get('copilot.maxPromptTokens', 8192) and passes to CopilotProvider constructor; package.json:171 declares workpackManager.copilot.maxPromptTokens setting; copilot-provider.ts:43 applies resolveMaxPromptTokens(); copilot-provider.test.ts verifies configured value is used. |
| AC6 | pass | workpack-detail-panel.ts:651-654 try/catch wraps HTML render, logRenderError() writes to OutputChannel, getFallbackHtmlContent() returns safe diagnostic HTML. |
| AC7 | pass | npm run test: 8 files, 38 tests passed (baseline was 6/24). New tests: commands.test.ts (executePrompt dispatch, executeAll dispatch, no-ready-prompts, cancellation, provider-missing, provider-unavailable), copilot-provider.test.ts (maxPromptTokens config). |
| AC8 | pass | Both executePrompt (register-commands.ts:1006) and executeAll (register-commands.ts:1113) have finally { treeProvider?.refresh() } blocks. |
